title: Stage 04 Build Gate
description: Stage 4 (Build) gate. One per area: stage-04-backend.json, stage-04-frontend.json, stage-04-platform.json, written by the corresponding dev-* agent in its worktree.

workstreams.description: Areas this gate covers (typically one of 'backend', 'frontend', 'platform'; mixed for /quick or /nano).

pr_summaries_written.description: Paths to pipeline/pr-<area>.md files this dev produced; reviewers read these in Stage 5.

local_verification.description: Commands the dev ran locally to verify the change (e.g. 'npm test', 'npm run lint'). Stage 4.5a re-runs these in CI.
